title: FactionCraft
description: FactionCraft brings minecraft to life by adding factions, fully super customizable through datapack.
body:
![FactionCraft Logo](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/816515509679423539/1118208086725894185/factioncraft.png)

FactionCraft is a Minecraft mod that enhances the existing Illager faction and brings the game to life by introducing new factions, customized through a datapack.

## New Factions
The mod introduces exciting new factions, adding more diversity to the Minecraft world:

- The **Undead** faction has upgraded their sieges and now includes powerful skeletons.
- The **Wither Army** retaliates against looters of their territory.
- The **Piglin Horde** remembers the legendary invasions.
- **The End** has come.

## Patrols & Raids
Like the original vanilla illager faction, these factions can all show up as patrols, which in turn will trigger raids on your villages. But unlike vanilla raids, the raiders are smarter, they will bring more to bigger villages and become more dangerous as the waves go on. Can you handle the ongoing onslaught?!

Various new raiders can also appear:

- More mounted mobs
- Diggers that will dig their way to the villagers
- Mobs that attain specific roles, like tank and healer

## War
War has also come to Minecraft. Enemy factions have relations and those that are enemies can suddenly start battling each other. Be careful not to be caught in between.

## Modpack Minded
FactionCraft is created with Modpackers in mind. It delivers as many controls as possible for modpack makers and other mod makers to include content from their mod as part of the faction system.

## Wiki
Be sure to check out the [FactionCraft Wiki](https://github.com/Infamous-Misadventures/FactionCraft/wiki) for an in-depth explanation on how to use and modify the mod.

## Commands
FactionCraft adds several commands that allow for playing around with the factions and raids.

## Streams
This mod was created with streamers in mind. The aforementioned commands can be utilized together with a mod like CCI, to really create something for your viewers to play with.
